title: BZR4 Tachometer PCB
summary: Designed and built a custom tachometer PCB for the BZR4 racecar using a CH32V003 microcontroller. It drives a shift-register LED array for real-time RPM visualization, improving driver feedback on the track.
highlights: Optimized embedded C firmware for low-latency LED updates.
Integrated with CAN bus for vehicle telemetry.
